/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/petri.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/petri.dir/src/brain/brain_pool.cu.o CMakeFiles/petri.dir/src/render/raylib_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/petri.dir/src/sim/simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/petri.dir/src/world/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/petri.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o petri   -L/usr/local/cuda-13.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-13.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lGL -lm -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lX11 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so _deps/raylib-build/raylib/external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
